Sponges (Porifera) on Singapore shores: photo index

sponges text index Phylum Porifera Photo index of sponges on Singapore shores

branching or lumpy encrusting balls, vases other shapes Sponge species are difficult to positively identify without dissection and examination of internal parts.
On this website, they are grouped by external features for convenience of display.

These lifeforms are NOT sponges


Solitary
sea squirt
Phylum Chordata
Class Ascidiacea


Yellow clustered bead ascidiansPhylum Chordata
Class Ascidiacea


Rock slime
ascidians
Phylum Chordata
Class Ascidiacea


Encrusting
coralline algae


Puffy
brown seaweed Colpomenia sp.


Bubble seaweed Boergesenia forbesii
